description: Schema and redaction policy for later Android Bluetooth HID gamepad proof rows; this row is not live proof.

redaction_policy.required: Rows must use sanitized labels, local artifact paths, and non-identifying status text only.

notes: Later rows must not claim current-phone, alternate-phone, macOS input, HID output, unsupported-output, or fallback success until live proof exists.

scenario: current phone Android Bluetooth HID start after USB deploy
evidence_refs: adb-logcat:2026-06-10T21:43:51 local BtGunHidGamepad proxy REQUESTING to AVAILABLE
adb-logcat:2026-06-10T22:36:39 local hostConnection CONNECTED and input SENT

scenario: current phone Android HID gamepad SDP registration
evidence_refs: adb-logcat:2026-06-10T21:43:51 local registerApp accepted=true
adb-logcat:2026-06-10T21:43:51 local onAppStatusChanged registered=true

scenario: Android discoverable pairing window before macOS pairing
evidence_refs: adb-logcat:2026-06-10T22:36:39 local pairingWindow open=true durationSeconds=120

scenario: macOS paired to Android Bluetooth HID gamepad without desktop companion LAN input
evidence_refs: user-confirmation:macos paired with phone
macos-hid-scan:Bluetooth transport PrimaryUsagePage=1 PrimaryUsage=5 GameController metadata present, device labels redacted
adb-logcat:2026-06-10T22:36:39 local hostConnection CONNECTED

scenario: macOS live HID input from paired Android gamepad with GameController CLI fallback
evidence_refs: probe-output:phase7-20260610-macos-iohid-unsandboxed observed button-a button-b button-x button-y stickX stickY
probe-output:phase7-20260610-macos-iohid-trigger-aim observed reload aimX aimY button-a button-b button-x button-y stickX
probe-output:phase7-20260610-macos-trigger-retest observed trigger and aimY after Android calibration mode cleared
blocking_notes: GCController.controllers returned no-controller-visible in CLI probe even though macOS IOHID lists the paired gamepad with GameController metadata; input pass is based on macOS IOHID fallback observations.

scenario: macOS host-origin output probe through paired Android HID gamepad
evidence_refs: probe-output:phase7-20260610-macos-iohid-unsandboxed haptic-output-probe-attempted status no-gamecontroller-haptics
probe-output:phase7-20260610-macos-iohid-trigger-aim haptic-output-probe-attempted status no-gamecontroller-haptics
adb-logcat:2026-06-10T22:40:02 local lastOutputCallback NONE lastOutputValidation NONE
blocking_notes: No GameController haptics object available from the live macOS probe path; Android did not receive onSetReport or onInterruptData during probe.

scenario: Browser-visible gamepad mapping after face button, LT/RT, and right-stick aim remap
evidence_refs: browser:gpadtester raw panel observed 8 buttons and 4 axes with right stick using axes[2]/axes[3]
browser:gpadtester raw panel after aim movement observed independent right-stick values axes[2]=-0.6635 axes[3]=0.3409 before final Y sign flip
browser:gpadtester raw panel after calibrated restore observed centered right-stick values axes[2]=-0.0238 axes[3]=-0.0030 while Android preview showed Calibrated aim active
probe-output:phase7-20260611-browser-z-rx-retest observed aimX on iohid-axis-50 and aimY on iohid-axis-51
android-tests:focused BtGunHidDescriptor BtGunHidReportPacker DashboardState passed
blocking_notes: Final descriptor uses buttons 1-4 for A/B/X/Y, buttons 7/8 for reload/trigger so gpadtester labels LT/RT, and axes X/Y/Z/Rx so gpadtester maps right stick from browser axes[2]/axes[3]. HID aim uses normalized MotionSample aimX/aimY first, preserving the active calibrated aim path; raw aim is only a fallback when normalized aim is unavailable. macOS Bluetooth pairing must be refreshed after descriptor shape changes.

scenario: macOS browser/GameController haptic compatibility after PID ForceFeedback experiment
evidence_refs: browser:gpadtester Controller Info reported No Vibration for the stable Android HID gamepad
macos-local:PID/Physical Interface Device descriptor experiment paired but did not publish a usable browser-visible gamepad
macos-local:stable gamepad descriptor without PID restored macOS hidutil and gpadtester visibility
blocking_notes: macOS browser/GameController haptics are deferred for this path. Keep stable gamepad input descriptor active; do not carry PID ForceFeedback descriptor or handler code in the Android HID path. Phone haptics remain available through the existing LAN/Windows VHF paths.
